problem id: 73539baa
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(4) XOR SHR(6)

examples:
  11101100 -> 11001101
  01110110 -> 01100110
  00101101 -> 11010010
  10011100 -> 11001011
  11000110 -> 01101111
  10001111 -> 11111010
  01010000 -> 00000100
  10101010 -> 10101000
  00001110 -> 11100000
  01011001 -> 10010100

query: 01111001
predicted answer: 10010110
